diagrams.title: MBR Partition Layout
diagrams.description: Shows a disk with 4 primary partitions, one being an Extended partition containing Logical partitions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how MBR organizes partitions and where logical partitions reside within extended partition

diagrams.title: GPT Partition Table Structure
diagrams.description: Illustrates GPT with primary header, partition entries array, and backup copies at disk end
diagrams.purpose: Show redundancy in GPT and UEFI-style partition organization

diagrams.title: Mounting Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how VFS handles mount request from user command to actual file system access
elements: Shell passes to kernel via system call
VFS identifies file system type (or auto-detects)
VFS calls FS-specific mount routine (ext4_mount, ntfs_mount)
Kernel links partition to mount point in inode tree
User space sees USB contents at /mnt/usb
diagrams.purpose: Explain the path from mount command to accessible file system
